subcodes.first_line: O my God, my Beloved, the Goal of my desire and the Object of my hope, my Refuge and my Shelter! This is a branch amongst Thy branches [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی و محبوبی و منتهی املی و غایه رجائی و حرزی و موئلی هذا افنون من افنان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @high station of the true believer, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @eulogies; reminiscences
